chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI CP No.381 of 2024 (Molana Muhammad Umair and another v. SHO PS Paposh Nagar and anothers) ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE: ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF THE JUDGE 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.3408/2024 3. For hearing of main case 29.04.2024 Mr. Shakeel Ahmed, advocate for the petitioners Ms. Farzana Kalam, advocate for the private respondent Syed Aly Maqbool, Additional Advocate General Mr. Muhammad Anwar Mahar, DDPP ------------------------- The petitioners by way of the instant petition have sought protection from the alleged harassment of the respondents. It is stated by the private respondents that the petitioners to settle their matrimonial dispute is involving them in court proceedings off and on. Be that as it may, if the petitioners are being harassed by the respondents then they have to seek protection from such harassment by approaching the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace having jurisdiction. No case for indulgence by this Court in the exercise of its writ jurisdiction is made out. Consequently, the instant petition is dismissed. J U D G E Nadir*
